noMembersInGroups: No members were found in the default privileged groups.
disclaimer.checks: Members of well-known admin groups (by RID), 12 account-level checks (Kerberoastable, AS-REP, reversible encryption, DES, delegation, SIDHistory, Protected Users, etc.), domain findings (KRBTGT age, LAPS, PSO, functional level, RBCD).
disclaimer.limitations: Only checks default privileged groups and LDAP-accessible attributes. Does not parse ACLs (nTSecurityDescriptor), GPO-applied restrictions, or local admin memberships.
disclaimer.tools: PingCastle, Purple Knight (Semperis), or BloodHound for a comprehensive privileged account audit.
